ul.li: Each Microservice gets it's own database
trpc used for communication between services in the backend
Redis is used for a cache
backend services are either ExpressJS or NestJS
Frontend services are written in NextJS
The backend sends events to cloudevents to use as a message queue
Cloudevents stores and updates it state to a mysql database for state persistence
Sytem cache is provided by a redis cluster
